message:
fix(doltserver): broaden system database filter in SHOW DATABASES parsing

Add IsSystemDatabase() helper that filters information_schema, mysql,
and dolt_cluster from SHOW DATABASES results. Previously only
information_schema was filtered, which could leak internal Dolt databases
into rig database lists.

Updated both parseShowDatabases() in doltserver and listDatabases() in
daemon to use the shared filter. Case-insensitive matching handles
varying Dolt/MySQL output casing.

Closes: gt-t7asr

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
